instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `requireFields` that accepts a map `model` and a sequence of required key names. When any key is missing or blank, render an error div listing the missing keys. Otherwise invoke nested content. Escape key names in output.
code:
<#-- Macro: requireFields(model, requiredKeys) with nested body --> <#macro requireFields model requiredKeys> <#assign missing = []> <#list requiredKeys as key> <#assign value = model[key]!""> <#if !value?has_content> <#assign missing = missing + [key]> <#if missing?has_content>
Missing required fields:
    <#list missing as key>
  • ${key?html}
<#else> <#nested>
